name: Claude for Safari
description_en: Control your real Safari browser on macOS via AppleScript and screencapture—open tabs, read pages, fill forms, click, and screenshot web content.
description_zh: 通过 AppleScript 与截屏控制 macOS 上真实的 Safari 浏览器——开标签页、读网页、填表单、点击并截取网页内容。
long_en: Drives the user's actual browser session rather than a headless instance, so it works with logged-in sites and existing state.
long_zh: 驱动用户当前真实的浏览器会话而非无头实例,因而能利用已登录站点与现有状态。
sec_note_en: Controls your live Safari with access to logged-in sessions; review actions and run only against sites you trust.
sec_note_zh: 操控你正在使用的 Safari、可触及已登录会话;请审阅操作,仅对可信站点使用。
